description: Style Note The camisole is feminine and fashionable at any given point and this camisole from jockey is designed keeping feminine slenderness in mind. Wear it alone or layered under shirts and jackets Product Details Burgundy camisole that has fashionable ultra soft, adjustable straps that rest comfortably on your shoulders and leaves no marks on your skin. The trendy logo straps makes a style statement of its own Material and Care Cotton/elastane Machine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Flat dry in shade Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
